titleStmt.title: SII 26.576: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 576. (A.R. No. 547 of 1909.) JŪLAKALLU, PALNAD TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Bhīmaliṅgēśvarasvāmi temple.

It records a grant of land behind the lands and lake orignally belonged to the donor with a sowing capacity of one tūmu, 2 kuchcheḷḷu to the west of Ayyavāri lake, the lands in the eastern borders of Chiṁtapalli, 2 kuchcheḷḷu received as the share of karaṇika, by Aṁbbarāju, son of Akkirāju and grandson of Jagarāja Yallamarāju belonging to Kāśyapa-gōtra and Āśvalāyana-sūtra for the celebration of festivals to god Bhīmanāthasvāmi of Jūlakaṁṭṭi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
bhīmēśvarula
ku Aṁbbaya A
bhiṣēkārccanaṁ ka
rōti .
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁ
bbulu 1635 Agunēṭi naṁddananāma saṁvvatsa
ra kārtika śu 15 lu . śrīmadakhilāṁḍḍa kōṭi
brahmāṁḍa nāyakulaina �lakaṁṭṭi mūla
sthānaṁ bhīmanāthasvāmulaku Āśvalāyana
sūtrōdbhavulaina kāśyapasagōtrōdbhavulaina ja
garāja yallamarājugāri pautru
luṁnnu Akkirājugāri putrulaina Aṁbba
rāju samarppiṁccina dharmaśāsanaṁ . mīku
pūrvamaina kṣētrālu cervu venaka varipola
ṁkaili tūmeḍu vittanālamērānu Ayya
vāri cervu paḍamaṭa reṁḍu kuccaḷḷuṁnnu
raṁggarāju kuṁṭṭa muṁdaranu ku . nu rāmē
śvaruniki kāreṁpūḍi trōvaku vuttaraṁ ci
ṁttapalli polimēra tūrppuna pedda Arakucca
la . kaḷyāṇa mahōtsavānaku peṭṭē polimē
raku dakṣiṇapu bhāgāna peddakuccala yī
kṣētrālu naḍustu puṁṇyaṁgānu śivarātrima
hōtsavānaku nākaraṇīkapu bhāgaṁ va
ccina ku 2 ga lōnu ciṁtapalli trōvaku dakṣa
ṇaṁ miṭṭacēnukaili yirusa vittanāla mē
ra samarppistini yī kaiṁkaryamu Ācaṁ
drārkka sthāyigānu voppanagona navadhariṁcca
valenū . maṁgaḷa mahā śrīśrīśrīṁ jēyu
nū . svadattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupāla
naṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
Digital edition of SII 26.576 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
